nasb.text: The rest turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon, but they caught 5,000 of them on the highways and overtook them at Gidom and killed 2,000 of them.

esv.text: And they turned and fled toward the wilderness to the rock of Rimmon. Five thousand men of them were cut down in the highways. And they were pursued hard to Gidom, and 2,000 men of them were struck down.

cnv.text: 其餘的人轉身，向著曠野逃跑，到了臨門的磐石那裡；以色列人在大路上除滅了他們五千人，追趕他們直到基頓，又擊殺了他們二千人。

ccb.text: 余下的人都逃往旷野的临门岩，沿途有五千人被杀。以色列人追杀他们，一直追到基顿，又消灭了他们两千人。
